personalInfo.personalStatement: Board-certified cardiologist with 16+ years of experience in interventional cardiology, clinical research, and patient care

workExperience.description: Oversee cardiac catheterization laboratory performing 800+ procedures annually; Lead multidisciplinary team of 12 physicians, nurses, and technicians; Perform complex interventional procedures including angioplasty, stent placement, and TAVR; Serve on hospital quality improvement committee reducing post-procedure complications by 23%

Provided comprehensive cardiovascular care to 2,000+ patients annually; Performed diagnostic procedures including echocardiograms and stress tests; Supervised cardiology fellows and medical residents during clinical rotations; Participated in on-call rotation for acute cardiac emergencies

Completed advanced training in interventional cardiology and cardiac imaging; Managed inpatient cardiology service and intensive care unit; Participated in multi-center clinical trial for novel anticoagulation therapy; Published 8 peer-reviewed articles in leading cardiology journals

publications.title: Outcomes of TAVR in High-Risk Patients

other.content:
Principal Investigator: Government-funded study on novel antiplatelet therapy (2020-2024)
Author of 42 peer-reviewed publications in major cardiology journals
H-index: 28
